title: lasianthus wallacei
intro: Lasianthus wallacei is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, which is native to Borneo. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The leaves and roots of Lasianthus wallacei have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and improving overall well-being. In some herbal traditions, the plant is prepared by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to make a tea, which may also be used topically as a paste or ointment to aid in wound healing and skin care.
